en.guest_hero_sub: Track income, expenses, and savings goals with Bacaro Budget Manager — your all-in-one AI-powered finance companion.
en.guest_features_title: Everything you need to manage money
en.guest_feat_1_desc: Monitor balances, income, and expenses at a glance with live-updating charts.
en.guest_feat_2_desc: Manage cash, bank accounts, e-wallets, and credit cards all in one place.
en.guest_feat_3_desc: Set and track savings targets with visual progress bars and deadline tracking.
en.guest_feat_4_desc: Get intelligent financial insights and answers powered by AI, tailored to your data.
en.forgot_desc: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
en.str_fbd680e5: . By creating an account and using this application, you agree to the following terms.
en.str_b8eeccc8: By registering, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and agree to these Terms and Conditions and our Privacy Policy.
en.str_66dd425d: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and all activity under your account.
en.str_65844f63: We collect and store financial data you input solely to provide the service. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties without your consent.
en.str_8b6ee8bf: You agree not to misuse the platform, attempt unauthorized access, or use it for any unlawful purpose.
en.str_337e7deb: We strive for uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access and are not liable for any losses due to downtime.
en.str_55c93fb9: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

en.str_3b979bac: , we believe that your financial data is personal and should remain private. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, protect, and handle your data when you use our application and its accompanying features, such as the Kwarta AI engine.
en.str_bba3ed23: We only collect data that is essential for the functionality of Bacaro:
en.str_057ba2a8: Transactions, wallet balances, and savings goals that you manually input.
en.str_3f97c447: Choice of theme (Dark/Light mode), language, and currency display settings.
en.str_710e9813: Your data is strictly used to empower your personal budget management experience. Specific uses include:
en.str_4947bcbb: Calculating net worth, monthly cash flow, and spending habits.
en.str_31d67f8d: Providing AI-driven financial insights and advice via
en.str_86ab757a: Enabling data exports in CSV format for your personal bookkeeping.
en.str_2bae4d3b: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal or financial data to outside parties. Your data is stored securely and is only accessible by you via your authenticated account.
en.str_177aac36: When you interact with Kwarta AI, your transaction summaries and goal data may be processed to generate helpful responses. These interactions are private and are used solely to enhance the accuracy of the AI's suggestions for your account.
en.str_49001e83: We use robust security protocols, including SSL encryption and secure password hashing, to protect your data. We retain your information as long as your account is active. You may use the
en.str_a8cdd544: feature in Settings at any time to permanently remove all your data from our servers.
en.str_87e25a00: Bacaro uses local storage and limited cookies to maintain your login session and save your UI preferences (like Dark Mode). These do not track your activity on other websites.
en.str_1ac88b89: By using Bacaro, you consent to our privacy policy as outlined here. We reserve the right to update this policy to reflect changes in our service or regulatory requirements.
en.str_da574566: © 2026 Bacaro Budget Manager. All rights reserved.
